echo "=== CREATE router-runtime-inventory.md ==="
cat > docs/router-runtime-inventory.md << 'MDEOF'
# Moreno AI Router Runtime Inventory

**Phase:** 8D  
**Captured:** Phase8C-SentinelConsultationFramework baseline  
**Evidence:** Live n8n export — not assumed, observed

---

## Workflow Name

`chatgpt-homelab-agent-router`

---

## Webhook URL

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Path | `chatgpt-homelab-agent` |
| Method | POST |
| Full URL | `http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent` |
| Status | Active |

---

## Current Nodes (Observed)

| Node Name | Type | Purpose |
|-----------|------|---------|
| Webhook | webhook | Entry point — receives all incoming POST requests |
| Understand Request | code | Parses and classifies the incoming request |
| Module Router | if | Routes to docker module or filesystem path |
| Filesystem Router | if | Sub-routes filesystem vs router info commands |
| Call 'chatgpt-portainer-admin-mcp' | executeWorkflow | Invokes docker module sub-workflow |
| Call 'moreno-filesystem-module' | executeWorkflow | Invokes filesystem module sub-workflow |
| Router Info | code | Handles router info / router health commands |
| Final Respond to Webhook | respondToWebhook | Returns response to caller |

---

## Current Routes (Observed)

```
Webhook
  └─→ Understand Request
        └─→ Module Router
              ├─→ [docker path] Call 'chatgpt-portainer-admin-mcp'
              │         └─→ Final Respond to Webhook
              └─→ Filesystem Router
                    ├─→ Call 'moreno-filesystem-module'
                    │         └─→ Final Respond to Webhook
                    └─→ Router Info
                              └─→ Final Respond to Webhook
```

---

## Current Modules (Observed)

| Module | Sub-Workflow | Workflow ID | Status |
|--------|-------------|-------------|--------|
| docker | chatgpt-portainer-admin-mcp | 6gNSHmccZ3hnt1Bk | Active |
| filesystem | moreno-filesystem-module | atAHS6uiWKM8d5pb | Active |
| router | (inline — Router Info node) | pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P | Active |
| sentinel | (not yet wired) | — | Advisory only |

---

## Known Commands (Validated)

| Command | Route | Handler |
|---------|-------|---------|
| `router info` | Filesystem Router → Router Info | Router Info node |
| `router health` | Filesystem Router → Router Info | Router Info node |
| `module info` | Filesystem Router → Router Info | Router Info node |
| `docker module` | Module Router → docker path | chatgpt-portainer-admin-mcp |
| `filesystem module` | Filesystem Router → filesystem path | moreno-filesystem-module |

---

| moreno-docker-module | Sub-workflow | n8n workflow ID DDMidlL6aKSAcOT4 |
